concerns: Step 2 states copy-button.ts and share-image-button.ts need aria-labels reviewed, but they already have them — the step should focus on rerun-button.ts (the only one missing an aria-label) and avoid unnecessary churn on the others.

Step 5 risk note correctly identifies that aria-label on sections duplicates visible h2 text — the plan should commit to using aria-labelledby referencing h2 ids instead, not leave it as a risk to address later.

Step 7 mentions using the `inert` attribute on the shell during intro overlay, which has limited browser support — the risks section flags this but the step itself doesn't specify a fallback strategy; plan should prefer aria-hidden='true' on underlying content as the primary approach.
Step 10 (manual keyboard walkthrough) is not automatable and cannot be verified by CI — consider adding a Playwright-based keyboard navigation smoke test to complement manual verification.

Testing recommendations reference tests/us-033/reduced-motion.test.ts but these tests already exist and pass — the plan should clarify it means verifying they still pass (regression check), not creating them.
